raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kalpi/ un Salamanx Kalpi/ kas
Seltn no Owira neffe/ tee atnegſte
arridsan Algumim Kohkus nn
Dahrgus Aknixus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehnisch darrija
no teem Algumim Kohkeen
Treppes ta KUNGA Namman
unta Kehuixa Nammā/ ir Kohk-
les un Sohina-Stabules preeksch
teem Kohfletajeem.
(Rohki) ne bija zittkahrt Judu
Seimmē redseti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehnisch Sala-
mans dewe tai Kehnixinnei no
Sabas wiſſu/ kas winnat grib-
bejahs/ ko winna luhdse/ bes ta/
to ta tam Kehnixam bij atnef-
fusi. Un ta greesahs atpakkat/
un gahje ar faweem Kalpeem fa-
wā Seimmē.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta Selta Swars/
kas Salamanam ik Gaddus
nahze/ bija feſchſints feſchdef-
mits un feſchi Talenti Selta/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bes ta/ ko tee no teem
Kupschem un Prezzineckeem ee-
Dabbuja/ ir wiſſi Kehnixi no A-
rabtjas/ un tahs paschas Sem-
mes Leeli-Kungi nette Salama-
xam Seltn un Sudrabu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehnisch Sala-
mans darrija dtwifints preeksch-
turramas Brunnas no fittama
Selta/ feſchſints Setta Gabba-
lus cedewe wiſsch preeksch we-
nahn preeſſchturraramahn Brunn
nahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un trheſſints fedſamas
Brunnas no fittama Selta/
tur dewe wiſsch trheſſints Gab-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Kehnisch lik
tahs eekſch ta Libbanus Mesch
Namma. Wehl darrija ta
Kehnisch leelu Krehsſu no El
wantu Rauleem/ un pahrwilke
ar tihru Seltn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Schim Krehsſam bija
ſchi Pakahpji/ un weens Kah
Pamettis no Selta/ kas pee
Krehsſa bija stipri pectaſſiht
un abbejās Puﬀēs btja tam Le
nes lthds tam Sehdektam / u
divi Lauwas stahweja pee tah
Lehnehin/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un dtwipadeſſints La
was stahweja tur us tahm
ſchahm Pakahpehm abbeje
Puﬀēs. Tahds ne irr ne ka
da Walstiha darrihts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir wiſſi dsextami Trau
ta Kehnixa Salamanx/ un wi
Trankt no Libbanus Mesch
Namma/ bija no feſſikſta S
ta/ Sudrabs Salamanx Lai
wiſſai ne tappe zeenihts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo ta Kehnixa Laiw
gahje us Tarsu ar Uraina Ka
peim/ tahs Laiwas nahze eek
trim Gaddem weenkahrt
Tarsus/ un nette Seltn un Su
rabu/ un Elewantu Kaulus/
Pehrtikes/ un Pawas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta tappe tas Kehnix
Salamanx leelaſs/ ne ka wi
Kehnixi wirs Semmes/ Bagg
tibā un Gudribā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſſt kehnixi w
Semmes mekleja Salama
Waig
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
